# extended LDIF
#
# LDAPv3
# base <DC=contoso,DC=local> with scope subtree
# filter: (objectclass=user)
# requesting: ALL
#

dn: CN=Administrator,CN=Users,DC=contoso,DC=local
objectClass: top
objectClass: person
objectClass: organizationalPerson
objectClass: user
cn: Administrator
sn: Administrator
description: Built-in account for administering the computer/domain
distinguishedName: CN=Administrator,CN=Users,DC=contoso,DC=local
memberOf: CN=Domain Admins,CN=Users,DC=contoso,DC=local
memberOf: CN=Enterprise Admins,CN=Users,DC=contoso,DC=local
memberOf: CN=Schema Admins,CN=Users,DC=contoso,DC=local
sAMAccountName: Administrator
userPrincipalName: administrator@contoso.local

dn: CN=svc-backup,OU=Service Accounts,DC=contoso,DC=local
objectClass: top
objectClass: person
objectClass: organizationalPerson
objectClass: user
cn: svc-backup
sn: Backup
distinguishedName: CN=svc-backup,OU=Service Accounts,DC=contoso,DC=local
memberOf: CN=Domain Users,CN=Users,DC=contoso,DC=local
sAMAccountName: svc-backup
userPrincipalName: svc-backup@contoso.local

dn: CN=jdoe,OU=Employees,DC=contoso,DC=local
objectClass: top
objectClass: person
objectClass: organizationalPerson
objectClass: user
cn: John Doe
sn: Doe
givenName: John
distinguishedName: CN=jdoe,OU=Employees,DC=contoso,DC=local
memberOf: CN=Domain Users,CN=Users,DC=contoso,DC=local
sAMAccountName: jdoe
userPrincipalName: jdoe@contoso.local
